title: Accessibility readability and UI-scale pass
summary: Validate and improve text readability, non-color-only state, UI scale, contrast, scroll usability and bilingual layout.
acceptance: Text remains readable in zh-CN and en at required viewports
UI scale or font-scale behavior is available and tested
Keyboard/mouse basics, contrast, long text and scroll regions are validated
Does not degrade simulation authority or existing E2E
